| 查询      | 子数组             | 阈值 | 频率表       | 答案 |

function solve(nums: number[], queries: number[][]): number[] {

    // Preprocess positions for each unique element

    const posMap = new Map<number, number[]>();

    for (let i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) {

        const num = nums[i];

        if (!posMap.has(num)) {

            posMap.set(num, []);

        }

        posMap.get(num).push(i);

    }

    // Helper functions for binary search

    function bisectLeft(arr: number[], target: number): number {

        let left = 0, right = arr.length;

        while (left < right) {

            const mid = Math.floor((left + right) / 2);

            if (arr[mid] < target) {

                left = mid + 1;

            } else {

                right = mid;

            }

        }

        return left;

    }

    function bisectRight(arr: number[], target: number): number {

        let left = 0, right = arr.length;

        while (left < right) {

            const mid = Math.floor((left + right) / 2);

            if (arr[mid] <= target) {

                left = mid + 1;

            } else {

                right = mid;

            }

        }

        return left;

    }

    const result: number[] = [];

    for (const [l, r, threshold] of queries) {

        let maxFreq = -1;

        let bestElement = -1;

        // Iterate through all unique elements

        for (const [num, positions] of posMap.entries()) {

            const count = bisectRight(positions, r) - bisectLeft(positions, l);

            if (count >= threshold) {

                if (count > maxFreq || (count === maxFreq && num < bestElement)) {

                    maxFreq = count;

                    bestElement = num;

                }

            }

        }

        result.push(bestElement === -1 ? -1 : bestElement);

    }

    return result;

}

function solve(nums: number[], queries: number[][]): number[] {

    // Preprocess positions for each unique element

    const posMap = new Map<number, number[]>();

    for (let i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) {

        const num = nums[i];

        if (!posMap.has(num)) {

            posMap.set(num, []);

        }

        posMap.get(num).push(i);

    }

    // Helper functions for binary search

    function bisectLeft(arr: number[], target: number): number {

        let left = 0, right = arr.length;

        while (left < right) {

            const mid = Math.floor((left + right) / 2);

            if (arr[mid] < target) {

                left = mid + 1;

            } else {

                right = mid;

            }

        }

        return left;

    }

    function bisectRight(arr: number[], target: number): number {

        let left = 0, right = arr.length;

        while (left < right) {

            const mid = Math.floor((left + right) / 2);

            if (arr[mid] <= target) {

                left = mid + 1;

            } else {

                right = mid;

            }

        }

        return left;

    }

    const result: number[] = [];

    for (const [l, r, threshold] of queries) {

        let maxFreq = -1;

        let bestElement = -1;

        // Iterate through all unique elements

        for (const [num, positions] of posMap.entries()) {

            const count = bisectRight(positions, r) - bisectLeft(positions, l);

            if (count >= threshold) {

                if (count > maxFreq || (count === maxFreq && num < bestElement)) {

                    maxFreq = count;

                    bestElement = num;

                }

            }

        }

        result.push(bestElement === -1 ? -1 : bestElement);

    }

    return result;

}
